content.text:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/CMakeLists.txt:
     1	if(NOT antlr4-runtime_FOUND OR NOT antlr4-generator_FOUND)
     2	  message(FATAL_ERROR "未找到 ANTLR4 ！")
     3	endif()
     4	
     5	antlr4_generate(
     6	  task2-antlr # 唯一标识名
     7	  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/SYsUParser.g4 # 输入文件
     8	  PARSER # 生成类型：LEXER/PARSER/BOTH
     9	  FALSE # 是否生成 listener
    10	  FALSE # 是否生成 visitor
    11	  "" # C++ 命名空间
    12	)
    13	
    14	add_custom_command(
    15	  OUTPUT ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/SYsULexer.tokens.hpp
    16	  COMMAND
    17	    ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/SYsULexer.py
    18	    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/SYsULexer.tokens
    19	    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/SYsULexer.tokens.hpp SYsULexerTokens
    20	  MAIN_DEPENDENCY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/SYsULexer.py
    21	  DEPENDS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/SYsULexer.tokens
    22	  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR})
    23	
    24	file(GLOB _common_src ../common/*)
    25	file(GLOB _src *.cpp *.hpp *.c *.h)
    26	add_executable(task2 ${_common_src} ${_src} ${ANTLR4_SRC_FILES_task2-antlr}
    27	                     ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/SYsULexer.tokens.hpp)
    28	
    29	target_include_directories(
    30	  task2 PRIVATE . ../common ${ANTLR4_INCLUDE_DIR_task2-antlr}
    31	                ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR})
    32	target_include_directories(task2 SYSTEM PRIVATE ${ANTLR4_INCLUDE_DIR}
    33	                                                ${LLVM_INCLUDE_DIRS})
    34	
    35	target_link_libraries(task2 antlr4_static LLVM)
    36
